summary: Phase 2.5-review-a (#256) VPS wiring: HITL runbook for DNS A records, Nginx vhost install, and Certbot auto-renew; executable provision-nginx.sh; smoke-test.sh --dns-tls-only mode for DNS/TLS validation before #257/#258 deploy apps. All five acceptance criteria mapped to contract tests; 424 unit tests pass. Live DNS/TLS on the VPS remains HITL for the operator.

mappings.criterion: DNS A records point to the VPS (documented in VPS runbook).
Nginx routes frontend and API upstreams separately (split vhosts).
HTTPS certificates are installed and auto-renew (Certbot documented).
VPS runbook excludes out of scope services (no HA/scaling/multi-worker).
Provision script does not reference forbidden services (no Redis/webhook upstream).

recommendations: Operator must complete HITL DNS A records and Certbot steps on the VPS before #257/#258 deploy slices.
Full smoke-test.sh (frontend/health/OAuth) requires upstream apps from #257 and #258.
provision-nginx.sh must be run on the VPS with sudo — local macOS test showed install path errors (expected outside Linux VPS).
